---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea for rtaudio
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Feature Description**
A clear (not necessarily concise!) description of what the feature is. Please include any detail you think is important!

**(Optional) Mockups**
If applicable, add mockups or screenshots to help explain your idea!

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
